rulings.Case Title: BALTICH VS GIOUZELIS
rulings.Rulings: GIVEN TRIAL CONTINUANCE & REOPENING OF DISCOVERY, COURT GRANTS MOTION TO AMEND. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BALTICH VS GIOUZELIS
rulings.Rulings: COURT TAKES INSTANT MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. COURT WILL CALENDAR A NEW HEARING DATE & BRIEFING SCHEDULE ON THE REVISED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IF THE PARTIES AGREE ON A DATE. OTHERWISE, DEFENDANT MAY APPLY EX PARTE FOR AN ORDER RE-CALENDARING THE REVISED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT WILL NOT HAVE TO PAY A NEW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILING FEE. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: BALTICH VS GIOUZELIS
rulings.Rulings: COURT TAKES INSTANT MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. COURT WILL CALENDAR A NEW HEARING DATE & BRIEFING SCHEDULE ON THE REVISED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IF THE PARTIES AGREE ON A DATE. OTHERWISE, DEFENDANT MAY APPLY EX PARTE FOR AN ORDER RE-CALENDARING THE REVISED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT WILL NOT HAVE TO PAY A NEW MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILING FEE. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: EULA SIVERAND VS. ENTRADE INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Provisional Certification Of Settlement Class And For Order For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED. COURT WILL GRANT APPROVAL OF COUPON SETTLEMENT ON FOLLOWING TERMS ONLY - ACTUAL AMOUNT OF COUPONS REDEEMED TO BE SUBMITTED TO COURT AFTER SETTLEMENT PERIOD. COURT WILL AWARD AS ATTORNEY FEES 1/3 OF THE ACTUAL AMOUNT OF ANY REDUCTION DUE TO COUPON IN SECOND PURCHASE. (302/AJR/AA)
